alkylation reagent: alkylated with iodoacetamide prior to the in-gel digestion
cleavage agent: digested in gel by adding 5 μl of 10 ng/μl trypsin
enrichment method: we generated a rabbit affinity-purified polyclonal antibody
instrument: the LC–MS system was a Dionex Ultimate 3000 nano-flow HPLC interfacing with a ThermoScientific Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer system
ionization type: The microelectrospray ion source is operated at 2.5 kV
reduction reagent: The bands were then reduced with DTT
